title: School Portraits
description: Give your Tampa Bay Islamic or private school a clean, organized picture day with flat-rate pricing, professional portraits, private online galleries, and optional parent ordering through PhotoDay.

gallery.alt: Clean studio-style portrait sample for school portrait direction
gallery.caption: Give families a clean portrait while your school gets files that work for records, yearbooks, IDs, and websites.

gallery.alt: Professional portrait sample with a polished school-friendly look
gallery.caption: Keep picture day professional, respectful, and easier for your office to manage.

gallery.alt: Portrait sample showing clean color, crop, and delivery quality
gallery.caption: Receive edited web and print-ready files, with optional online ordering for families.

faq.question: How fast are photos delivered?
faq.answer: Plan on delivery within 2 weeks. Delivery is often faster, but the 2-week window protects editing, organization, and quality control.

faq.question: Do you have to use PhotoDay?
faq.answer: No. PhotoDay is included, but optional. If you do not want online parent ordering, your edited and cropped files can be delivered through Google Drive or on a USB drive you provide.

faq.question: Can parents order prints?
faq.answer: Yes, if you enable parent ordering through PhotoDay. Families can order professional lab prints instead of relying on low-quality local printing.

faq.question: Can parents download digital files?
faq.answer: Yes. You can offer digital downloads through PhotoDay if that is the best fit for your families.

faq.question: Can your school receive all edited files?
faq.answer: Yes. Standard and Full School packages can include a Google Drive archive of edited and cropped files. USB delivery is also available if you provide the USB drive.

faq.question: Can your school recover the picture day cost from photo orders?
faq.answer: Yes. You can keep parent pricing low, set pricing to recover part of the portrait day cost, or structure ordering as a school fundraiser.

faq.question: What add-ons are available?
faq.answer: You can add extra students at $10 per student, staff-only headshot sessions from $500-$900, staff headshots on picture day at $20 per person, a second backdrop for $300, rush delivery under 5 business days for an added 25%, yearbook or ID export formatting for $250, on-site print coordination by custom quote, and second shoot days from $1,200-$1,800.

faq.question: Do you photograph staff too?
faq.answer: Yes. You can add staff headshots to any package at $20 per person, or book a separate staff-only headshot session from $500-$900.

faq.question: What if your school has more than 225 students?
faq.answer: Start with Full School Portrait Day, then add students at $10 per student. If you need a second shoot day, staff portraits, extra coordination, or rush delivery, those items can be scoped before booking.

faq.question: What should you send before requesting a date?
faq.answer: Send your school name, contact person, email, phone, estimated student count, whether staff headshots are needed, your preferred picture day window, and whether you want parent ordering through PhotoDay.

faq.question: What area do you serve?
faq.answer: Alpha Bravo Media is based in Tampa Bay and serves local Islamic schools, private schools, weekend schools, and community programs.

value.name: Essential Portrait Day
value.bestFor: Your school has a smaller student count, weekend program, class, or community education group.

value.name: Standard Portrait Day
value.bestFor: Your school needs a complete picture day for a medium-sized student body.
includes: Google Drive archive of edited/cropped files

value.name: Full School Portrait Day
value.bestFor: Your school has roughly 175 to 225 students and wants the cleanest all-around option.
includes: Best fit for most private and Islamic schools
